message.content:
Phase 1 Status Report:

✅ **PHASE 1 COMPLETE**

All deliverables completed:
1. ✅ Architecture Review - System-architect rated 7/10, CONDITIONAL GO
2. ✅ Visual Diagrams - Business-analyst created 6 Mermaid diagrams
3. ✅ ADO Story Creation - All 8 testing stories created successfully:
   - Story 6.1: Set Up Testing Infrastructure (5 points)
   - Story 6.2: Write Unit Tests for Server Actions (8 points)
   - Story 6.3: Write Integration Tests for Database Operations (5 points)
   - Story 6.4: E2E Test - Create-Complete-Delete Flow (5 points)
   - Story 6.5: E2E Test - Form Validation (3 points)
   - Story 6.6: Implement Accessibility Automated Testing (3 points)
   - Story 6.7: Implement Performance Testing (3 points)
   - Story 6.8: Set Up CI/CD Pipeline with Automated Tests (5 points)
   
   Work Item IDs: 2902-2909 in Azure DevOps project "Todo-App (Tadeu Marques)"

**Request:** Proceed to Phase 2 - Coordinate with z-cora:senior-developer to implement Story 6.1 (Set Up Testing Infrastructure) following the MANDATORY workflow from CLAUDE.md.

User's directive: "yes to all. I want you to have the team fix the code in the proper way"

content.text:

Let me first read the current codebase structure to provide proper context to the senior developer.

content.text:
Perfect! Now I have a complete picture of the codebase. Let me prepare the handoff to z-cora:senior-developer with all the necessary context.

## Phase 2: Implementation Handoff

### Story 6.1: Set Up Testing Infrastructure (5 points)

**Current Codebase Analysis:**
- Next.js 16.1.2 with React 19.2.3
- Prisma ORM with LibSQL adapter
- TypeScript configuration present
- Server actions pattern for data operations
- React Hook Form for form handling
- No testing infrastructure currently present

**Technical Context:**

**Key Files:**
- `/Users/tadeumarques/Coding/tadeu-todo-app/package.json` - Dependencies
- `/Users/tadeumarques/Coding/tadeu-todo-app/app/actions/todos.ts` - Server actions (5 functions)
- `/Users/tadeumarques/Coding/tadeu-todo-app/app/components/TodoForm.tsx` - Client form component
- `/Users/tadeumarques/Coding/tadeu-todo-app/app/components/TodoList.tsx` - List display
- `/Users/tadeumarques/Coding/tadeu-todo-app/app/components/TodoItem.tsx` - Individual item
- `/Users/tadeumarques/Coding/tadeu-todo-app/prisma/schema.prisma` - Database schema
- `/Users/tadeumarques/Coding/tadeu-todo-app/lib/prisma.ts` - Prisma client setup

**Requirements from Story 6.1:**

Install and configure:
1. Jest with TypeScript support
2. React Testing Library
3. Playwright for E2E testing
4. Testing utilities for Next.js server components
5. Mock libraries for Prisma
6. Create test database setup utilities
7. Configure separate test databases
8. Set up coverage reporting

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [x] Jest configured with TypeScript and Next.js support
- [x] React Testing Library set up with custom render utilities
- [x] Playwright installed with browsers and base configuration
- [x] Test database utilities created for isolated testing
- [x] Coverage reporting configured (80% threshold)
- [x] npm test scripts added (test, test:e2e, test:coverage)
- [x] Example test file demonstrating setup works

**Notes:**
- Custom Prisma output path: `../app/generated/prisma`
- LibSQL adapter requires special test configuration
- Server actions need proper mocking strategy

---

**@z-cora:senior-developer - Please implement Story 6.1 following these guidelines:**

1. Install all necessary testing dependencies with proper versions for Next.js 16.1.2 and React 19.2.3
2. Configure Jest with TypeScript, Next.js, and coverage reporting
3. Set up React Testing Library with custom utilities
4. Install and configure Playwright for E2E testing
5. Create test database utilities that work with LibSQL
6. Add test scripts to package.json
7. Create example tests demonstrating the setup works
8. Ensure coverage threshold is set to 80%
9. Document any special configuration needed for the custom Prisma output path

**Deliverables:**
- Updated `/Users/tadeumarques/Coding/tadeu-todo-app/package.json` with test dependencies and scripts
- New configuration files (jest.config.js, playwright.config.ts)
- Test utilities in appropriate directories
- Example test files demonstrating the infrastructure works
- Documentation on running tests

Please proceed with implementation following production-ready code standards with comprehensive testing.
